scripts.lint:design-system: pnpm exec eslint --config eslint.rdna.config.mjs 'packages/radiants/components/core/**/*.{ts,tsx}' 'apps/rad-os/**/*.{ts,tsx}' 'tools/playground/**/*.{ts,tsx}' && pnpm lint:token-colors
scripts.registry:generate: pnpm --filter @rdna/radiants generate:schemas && pnpm --filter @rdna/radiants generate:figma-contracts && pnpm --filter @rdna/playground registry:generate
scripts.registry:test:radiants: pnpm --filter @rdna/radiants exec vitest run registry/__tests__/registry.test.ts registry/__tests__/registry-metadata.test.ts registry/__tests__/PropControls.test.tsx registry/__tests__/runtime-coverage.test.ts registry/__tests__/runtime-attachments-props.test.ts --cache=false
scripts.registry:check:full: pnpm registry:check:freshness && pnpm registry:test:radiants && pnpm registry:test:playground
